---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve PlotMate
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 15, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 130, Firefox 133, Safari 18)
- **Node.js version:** (run `node -v`)

## Additional context

Any other details — error messages from the browser console, relevant project settings, etc.
